name: New agent request
about: Request a new agent topic (e.g. Argo CD, kubectl, Helm).
title: "[agent request] <topic>"
labels: ["agent-request"]
---

### Topic

### Why it's worth adding

<!-- What problem would this agent solve? Which teammates benefit? -->

### Upstream sources for the agent to draw on

At least one valid URL is required. The more complete, the easier this is to build.

- Project repository: <!-- e.g. https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd -->
- Official docs: <!-- e.g. https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/ -->
- API reference (if separate): 
- Other canonical references (specs, RFCs, CRDs):

### Known gotchas / common misconceptions
